title: Dokumen-Pintar configuration
description: Configuration for the Dokumen-Pintar MCP server. Drop the `$schema` reference into your JSON file to get autocomplete + validation in editors that support it (VS Code, Cursor, IntelliJ, Zed).

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema. Editors use it for autocomplete; the server strips it before validation.

roots.description: Workspace roots the server may access. At least one is required. Names must be unique.

exclude_patterns.description: Glob patterns that the server skips during tree walks, searches, and batch operations. Patterns match against the relative posix path within a root, not just the filename.

max_file_size_mb.description: Files larger than this are rejected by every tool that reads bytes. Limit applies to the on-disk size, including ZIP-compressed Office files.

default_encoding.description: Fallback encoding for text writes and when auto-detect is inconclusive.

auto_detect_encoding.description: Sniff file encoding before reading. Falls back to default_encoding.

name.description: Alphanumeric identifier (dashes / underscores allowed). Used in workspace URIs like `<name>:/relative/path`.

path.description: Absolute or `~`-expanded path to the root directory. Environment variables (`$VAR`, `${VAR}`) are expanded at load time.

writable.description: When false, every mutating tool refuses changes to this root.

enabled.description: Master switch for the snapshot store. When false, version_* tools return empty and destructive operations are unrecoverable.

storage_mode.description: per_root keeps snapshots inside each root; global puts them in global_storage_path; flexible tries per_root and falls back to global if a root is read-only.

global_storage_path.description: Absolute path used by global / flexible storage modes. Null = platform-appropriate user data directory.

retention_days.description: Snapshots older than this are pruned by version_purge. 0 disables age-based pruning.

max_versions_per_file.description: Maximum number of snapshots kept per file. Oldest entries are pruned when exceeded.

enabled.description: Append every mutating tool call to a JSONL audit log.

log_path.description: Absolute path. Null = .mcpdocs/audit.jsonl in the first writable root.

stdio.description: Enable stdio transport (Claude Desktop, Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf). Standard for local use.

host.description: Bind address. Keep as 127.0.0.1 unless you intend to expose the server.

auth_token.description: Bearer token required on HTTP requests. Null = no auth. Always set this when host != 127.0.0.1.

enabled.description: Registers search_semantic, semantic_index_path, semantic_stats. Requires the [semantic] extra.

model.description: HuggingFace model id used for embedding.

index_path.description: SQLite vector index location. Null = platform user-data directory.

allow_sensitive.description: When false, blocks .env, credential files, private keys, .ssh, etc.

follow_symlinks.description: When false, symlinks are not followed - prevents sandbox escape via symlinks.

validate_roundtrip_writes.description: Verify structured writes are re-readable. Small overhead, catches handler bugs.
